tracks.meaning: a software program or piece of code designed to perform specific tasks on a computer or device
a formal written request or submission to an organization for a service, job, or admission
the act or process of putting something into operation or making practical use of something
a formal request made to a court or legal authority for a ruling or decision
the external topical treatment or rubbing of a substance onto the skin or a body part
a practical implementation or deployment of a technology, system, or scientific principle in real-world use
the act of constructing or building something physical
the practical use or exercise of a skill, knowledge, or theoretical concept in practice
the spreading or treatment of a substance like fertilizer or pesticide on land
dedication, effort, or concentrated attention directed toward achieving a goal
